subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Hidden Essence in the Sanctuary of Eternity, and by Thy Most Exalted, Most Supreme Remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بذاتک الغیب فی مکمن البقاء و بذکرک العلی الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @prayer for protection
